name: Honey-Lavender Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first four ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Whisk sugar and eggs in a large bowl until light lemon-colored; stir in the next three ingredients (vanilla, orange zest, and honey). Sift dry ingredients over egg mixture, then fold in until dough is just combined.
3. Adjust oven rack to middle position and heat oven to 350°F. Halve the dough and turn each portion onto an oiled cookie sheet covered with parchment. Using floured hands, quickly stretch each portion of dough into a rough 13-by-2-inch log, placing them about 3 inches apart on the cookie sheet. Pat each dough shape to smooth it.
4. Bake until loaves are golden and just beginning to crack on top, about 35 minutes. Cool the loaves for 10 minutes; lower oven temperature to 325°F.
5. Cut each loaf diagonally into 3/8-inch slices with a sharp knife. Lay the slices about 1/2 inch apart on the cookie sheet, cut side up, and return them to the oven. Bake until crisp and golden brown on both sides, about 15 minutes. Transfer biscotti to a wire rack and cool completely.
(Biscotti can be stored in an airtight container for at least 1 month). Makes 4-5 dozen
